permits.description: Renovate the existing solarium with new support columns, windows and door.  Existing roof and masonry base will remain as is.  Walls will be partially re-framed.
permits.contractor: Modern Architectural Construction DBA Archadeck of Suburban Boston
permits.score_reasons: moderate cost ($37,000); keyword: renovate; minor: solar; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The permit is for a single, moderate-cost solarium renovation at an owner-occupied property, lacking the high-end kitchen or bathroom updates typical of a pre-sale flip.
